title: Convert default_network from snake_case to camelCase
body:
<!--- Please read the [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/containers/container-libs/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) before proceeding --->

https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/27580 

As discussed in the issue, I’ve updated the default network name from snake_case to camelCase.

comments.body: ✅ A new PR has been created in buildah to vendor these changes: **https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/6549**
